history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A full-body shot of a person wearing a black hooded zip-up jacket with a large white star and "CL" logo on the chest, and baggy, dark-wash jeans adorned with large white letters "C", "H", and "MB" on the left leg. The person is wearing white and grey sneakers and has their hood up, obscuring their face. They are leaning against a dark grey wall in front of a modern building with large glass windows. Behind the glass, shelves are visible, stocked with numerous small packages, likely coffee or tea. In front of the building, on the ground level, are several large burlap sacks with a circular logo and text. The lighting is bright, suggesting daytime, with soft shadows. The overall color palette is dominated by black, white, grey, and the warm tones of the building's interior and the burlap sacks. The mood is casual and urban, with a hint of mystery due to the obscured face. The image has a slightly gritty, street-style aesthetic.
